compiled_state.title: validate.sh: exit code 144 (SIGURG) kills validation runs before test-batched.sh can complete
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Bug details: validate.sh --ci exits with code 144 (SIGURG) before the test-batched.sh run can complete. This causes validate.sh to show 'tests: PENDING' indefinitely and prevents the session from proceeding to commit. The model-id-lint check also times out intermittently with exit code 144 during parallel validate.sh runs. validate.sh was supposed to handle test batching gracefully via test-batched.sh with 45s budget, but SIGURG from the Claude Code tool call ceiling (48s/73s) kills the outer validate.sh process before test-batched.sh can record a 'pass' result. Expected: validate.sh should complete each batch within the tool timeout and leave state for the next call to resume. Actual: validate.sh itself gets killed (144) and neither the tests.rc nor test-session-state.json is updated. Fix candidate: shorten the internal timeout budget or use shorter batches to fit within the tool call ceiling.
comments.author: Test
